name: Mod Fetcher
description: Allows you to save and load mods between computers

set-configs.name: Set settings
set-configs.description: If true, mod settings will be fetched when loading

server-password.name: Server password
server-password.description:
The password to use when accessing the Mod Fetcher server. It is recommended to change this value.
<cr>Ensure this is not a password you use for any other service, there is no reason to trust me.</c>

Defaults to a sha hash of your GD account password.
